info.title: Version 2 Development
info.subtitle: Framework for Method Ringing, Appendix G

section.title: A. Team
section.para: Version 2 was developed by the CC Framework Team, which is part of the Technical and Taxonomy CC Workgroup.
The CC Framework team comprises Tim Barnes (team leader), Mark Davies, John Harrison, Graham John, Don Morrison and Philip Saddleton.

section.title: B. Objectives
section.para: (a) Suggestions received from members of the ringing community subsequent to the implementation of version 1; and
(b) Improvements identified by the Framework team.

listitem.para: Click here for the first RW article on version 2 by the Framework team.
Click here for the second RW article on version 2 by the Framework team.
Click here for a document describing the changes made in version 2.
